title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 19 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 19 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 19 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/01/2026
Today, the iron ore futures market experienced a significant decline, with the main contract I2605 closing at794 yuan per ton, down 2.58% from the previous trading day. Spot prices also fell by 10-15 yuan per ton compared to the previous trading day. Market activity was subdued, with traders showing limited enthusiasm in quoting prices, and steel mills conducting fewer inquiries, mostly making purchases for routine inventory replenishment.
